title: Record competing explanations
lesson: Keep alternative explanations visible when evidence supports them.
projectChange: Record evidence-grounded rival hypotheses with promoted opportunities.

score.applicabilityReasoning: The source lesson directly applies to opportunity verification.
score.impactReasoning: Visible rival hypotheses improve the quality of promotion decisions.
score.confidenceReasoning: Source and project evidence both support the change.
score.implementationCostReasoning: The change is limited to verifier logic and tests.
score.riskReasoning: Advisory-only verification preserves existing promotion behavior.

rivalExplanationsConsidered: The observed weakness may come from insufficient source evidence rather than verifier behavior.
negativeSignal: The optional field may be absent in older Opportunity artifacts.
negativeCases: Do not require rival hypotheses for speculative or below-threshold opportunities.
